name: CopilotAgentROITracker
description: Track time and cost savings from Copilot Studio, M365 Copilot, and Azure AI Foundry agents with an executive dashboard.

environmentVariables.description: The URL of the deployed Azure App Service (e.g., https://copilotroi-app-xxxx.azurewebsites.net)
The Tenant ID of the customer's Azure AD / Microsoft Entra ID
The Client ID of the Azure AD app registration used for API access

connectionReferences.description: Connection to Power Platform Admin API for scanning Copilot Studio agents
Connection to Microsoft Graph API for M365 Copilot agents

flows.name: SyncAgentsDaily
flows.description: Runs daily to scan all connected environments and sync agent inventory

flows.name: TrackUsageEvent
flows.description: Triggered when an agent is used — records the event in the ROI Tracker
